lockedByCommit: placeholder — update when copying this file to audit/waivers.json
description: Example waiver file. Copy to audit/waivers.json (gitignored) when a Critical finding needs a time-bounded release waiver per requirements.md §16.4. Each waiver requires THREE signers: releaseEngineer, qaLead, techLead. An expiresAt in the past → the waiver no longer applies and the Critical re-fails the gate.

waivers.rationale: Short human-readable explanation of WHY this Critical is acceptable to ship: what the user impact is, what compensating controls are in place, when and how the underlying fix is tracked.
